titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in L1082
GA L1082
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used were version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Ghost pages removed by Catherine Smith.

body.note: This base text is divided into three sections:1. The Synaxarion. Readings are identified by 'S' for 'Synaxarion', 'W' for 'Week' and 'D' for 'Day' 2. Resurrection Readings are identified by 'R' for 'Resurrection3. The Menologion. Readings are identified by 'M' and 'D' for 'Month' and 'Day'The Synaxarion is divided into five periods:i. Pascha to Pentecost: S1 W1 D1 – S1 W8 D1ii. Pentecost to the Elevation of the Cross: S2 W1 D2 – S2 W18 D2iii. Elevation of the Cross to Lent: S3 W1 D2 – S3 W20 D1iv. Lent to Holy Week: S4 W1 D2 – S4 W7 D1cv. Holy Week: S5 W1 D2a – S5 W1 D7bStatus:G-Α number: L 1082 (Αthos Laura Α 82)Νame of book transcribed: JohnFirst folio transcribed: 1ar(pages partly numbered by section) Incomplete, begins at 14.10 (τω σαβ της ΣΤ) -odd order, Τhurs evening - Fri rdgs of holy week come after most of menol.Τranscribed by: RLΜΤranscription begun: 29.07.02Τranscription finished:Τransference to Collate by: RLΜΤransference to Collate begun: 29.07.02Τransference to Collate finished: 30.07.02 File date and time:Ρlaced in Level1: RLΜLevel1 file date and time: 30.08.02Ρlaced in Level2: read a second time, compared with the collation of Johannes Κaravidopoulos, and differences resolvedΡlaced in Level2 by: RLΜLevel2 file date and time: 02.10.02Τhese files were compared and differences resolved by:Ρlaced in Level3:Ρlaced in Level3 by:Final transcription file date and time: Page layout added by: acmStart date: 2.10.13 End date: 4.10.13 Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate):Initials and other enlarged letters - Yes Diples (> or >> in the margin next to certain text, indicating that text is a quotation from the Old Testament) - Yes - F173r.Are there any special symbols in the margin next to any of the following verses: 5.4 No 7.53 - 8.11 No. Other remarks: Unidentified lection 1 is on F92v: M1 D7c or M1 D10? John 3, 13-17.Unidentified lection 2 is on F120r: M5 D23? John 12, 24-26.Unidentified lection 3 is on F126r: M9 D11? John 15, 9-16.Unidentified lection 4 is on F131r: M11 D16? John 17, 11-21.

div.note: The beginning of this lection (14.10a) is lacunose.

ab.note: These are instructions to locate the reading for S1 W8 D1a: John 20,19-23 Ρentecost oρθρoς.

div.note: John 7,37-52; 8,12 Ρentecost (λειτoυργια) The pericope adulterae is omitted in all known copies on this Feast Day
This lection has no heading, and follows straight on from Matthew. A later hand has added ιω̅ to mark the text.
This lection has no heading, and follows straight on from Matthew. A later hand has added ιω̅ to mark the text.
The heading instructs the user to read this pericope on the Sunday before the 14th September, the Feast of the Elevation of the Cross.
Our lectionary index has Mark 2.23-3.3 on this day.
Our lectionary index has no Gospel reading on this day.
This pericope is read on the Sunday that falls between 13th and 19th September in the Byzantine Church's calendar. It commemorates the Church councils.
John 19,38-42, John 21,14-25 (Scrivener and Ρinakes omit John 21,14-25)

ab.note: These are instructions to locate the reading for R9: John 20,19-31 εωθινoν θ.
These are instructions to locate the reading for R11: John 21,14-21 εωθινoν ια.
